photoAvatarOnboarding.title: Create your own face & voice avatar
photoAvatarOnboarding.subtitle: Turn one portrait photo and a voice sample into a lecture avatar of yourself. The flow goes: upload a photo → generate & pick a look → preview.
photoAvatarOnboarding.deferredBanner: The self-avatar API isn't deployed yet, so this is a preview with sample data. Your photo, looks, and voice will be saved and generated for real once the backend is connected.

embed.title: Create an avatar from your photo
embed.description: Upload one portrait photo and we generate several looks that keep your face. Set the one you like as the default look and it becomes the base appearance for your lecture videos.
embed.setDefault: Set this as the default look
embed.confirmed: Default look set. You can now create lectures with your own face.
embed.confirmedBody: The selected look is saved as the base appearance for your lecture videos. Create your own voice in the voice card below to use them together.

upload.title: Upload a portrait photo
upload.description: One clear, front-facing photo is enough. Following the guidelines below produces a more natural avatar.
upload.guideAttire: Neat attire, such as a suit
upload.previewAlt: Preview of the uploaded portrait photo
upload.privacyNote: Your photo is stored securely in private storage and is used only to train your avatar.
upload.errorType: Only JPEG or PNG images can be uploaded.
upload.errorTooLarge: The photo must be 8MB or smaller.
upload.errorUpload: Photo upload failed. Please try again shortly.

looks.title: Create looks with your face
looks.description: Pick a persona, outfit, background, and expression, and we'll generate several looks in that style at once while keeping your face.
looks.restart: Start over with a different photo
looks.costNote: Just pick from the categories above. Once you reach 20, you must delete some before generating more.
looks.saveError: Could not save to your library. Please try again shortly.
looks.capReached: Please pick from the looks you've already made. You can generate more again shortly.
looks.capReachedHint: Stalled looks are taking up your slots. Tap a stalled look to clear it, then you can generate again.
looks.removePendingConfirm: Clear this stalled or failed look? Freeing the slot lets you generate again.
looks.error: Could not start look generation. Please try again shortly.
looks.backgroundNote: Generation runs on the server. You can close this window — it keeps going and resumes when you return.

detail.title: Look detail
detail.extraPlaceholder: e.g. blue tie / a brighter smile / add glasses
detail.extraHelp: We'll keep this look's base and tweak only the expression, outfit, or color you describe.
detail.regenerated: A new look is being generated and will appear below.
detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this look from your library? This cannot be undone.
detail.capReachedNote: You've reached the maximum number of looks. Clear some looks in the gallery and try again.

select.title: Pick your default look
select.description: Choose one look you like as the default. This look becomes the default appearance for your lecture videos.
select.empty: No finished looks yet. Please generate looks in the previous step first.
select.restart: Start over with a different photo
select.error: Could not select the default look. Please try again shortly.

preview.title: Preview with your voice
preview.description: Generate a short preview of the selected look speaking in your own voice. Confirm if you're happy with it.
preview.noLook: No look selected. Please pick a look in the previous step.
preview.generateNote: Runs one HeyGen render with the selected look and your voice (takes a few dozen seconds).
preview.needVoice: Create your voice on the right first, then you can preview with it.
preview.mockNote: Before the backend is connected we show a sample clip. Once connected it renders with your look and voice.
preview.confirmed: Your avatar is confirmed. You can now create lectures with your own face and voice.
